headline: Mastercard Adds 3 Stablecoins to Settlement Network

article.title: Mastercard expands support to USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD stablecoin settlement
article.summary: The payments giant said USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD and other stablecoins will support new settlement options across multiple blockchains.

headline: Trezor Downplays Ledger's 7 Chip Security Risk

article.title: Trezor says Safe 7 chip flaw found by Ledger does not put funds at risk
article.summary: Trezor and Tropic Square disclosed a TROPIC01 chip vulnerability found during a Ledger Donjon audit, saying the Safe 7 wallet and user funds remain secure.

headline: Hormuz Bypass Routes Cover 30% of Oil Disruptions

article.title: Oil’s Hormuz Alternatives Offer Only a Partial Fix
article.summary: Pipelines and ports provide a critical bypass, but not necessarily a sufficient long-term solution should the Iran threat persist.

headline: BNP Manager Buys 97% Outperformer After Selloff

article.title: BNP Manager Who Beat 97% of Peers Is SMR Buyer After Selloff
article.summary: A fund run by BNP Paribas Asset Management that’s outperformed 97% of its peers over the past year says it’s now moving into small-modular-reactor stocks after long shunning the sector as a “non-viable” investment.

article.title: Democrats Sanders and Warren Push Labor Department to Abandon Bitcoin 401(k) Rule
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Democrats Sanders and Warren Push Labor Department to Abandon Bitcoin 401(k) Rule
Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren are urging the U.S. Department of Labor under Donald Trump to withdraw a proposed rule allowing Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies in retirement accounts.

headline: Bitcoin Stocks Plummet 10% as BTC Sells Off

article.title: Bitcoin Stocks, Led By Strategy (MSTR), Take a Beating as BTC Price Sells Off
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Stocks, Led By Strategy (MSTR), Take a Beating as BTC Price Sells Off 
Bitcoin’s drop into the mid-$67,000s — driven by ETF outflows, Mt. Gox movements, geopolitical tension, and Strategy’s first BTC sale in years—triggered an outsized selloff in crypto-linked stocks.

headline: Santos Faces DOJ Probe Over $100k Kalshi Trades

article.title: George Santos Referred to DOJ, CFTC Over State of the Union Kalshi Trades: Report
article.summary: The pardoned ex-congressman allegedly bet against his own State of the Union appearance while publicly hyping it.

headline: UK Soccer Clubs Face $1M Crypto Sponsorship Crackdown

article.title: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals
article.summary: The FCA has warned Premier League clubs that partnerships with unlicensed crypto firms could expose fans to unregulated trading platforms.

headline: Trezor Safe 7 Chip Flaw Exposed: $7B At Risk

article.title: Ledger researchers find flaw in chip used by Trezor Safe 7; Trezor says user funds safe
article.summary: Ledger's Donjon team found a laser-based hardware flaw in the TROPIC01 chip used in the Trezor Safe 7, but Trezor says no funds are at risk.

headline: Grayscale Launches $HYPG ETF on Nasdaq Today

article.title: Grayscale gets behind the hype, launching its HYPG Hyperliquid ETF on Nasdaq
article.summary: Grayscale entered the ring with its own Hyperliquid linked ETF, setting a new low for fees as competition intensifies among firms.

headline: Partners Group Cuts Redemptions in $10B Fund

article.title: Partners Group limits withdrawals in private equity fund for wealthy individuals
article.summary: Swiss private capital firm caps redemptions from its $8.6bn flagship vehicle

article.title: Cliffwater’s flagship private credit fund redemption requests hit 17%
article.summary: Fund with net assets of $31bn aimed at retail investors limits withdrawals in latest sign of exodus from sector
